content.text: Rewrite the rate-limit defaults and separately bump the burst constant.

content.content:
package ratelimit

var defaults = Limits{
	RequestsPerSecond: 10,
	Burst:             20,
	WindowSeconds:     60,
	MaxQueueDepth:     100,
	RejectOnFull:      false,
}

const burstCeiling = 50

input.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: internal/ratelimit/config.go
@@ var defaults = Limits{
-	RequestsPerSecond: 10,
-	Burst:             20,
-	WindowSeconds:     60,
-	MaxQueueDepth:     100,
-	RejectOnFull:      false,
+	RequestsPerSecond: 25,
+	Burst:             40,
+	WindowSeconds:     30,
+	MaxQueueDepth:     250,
+	RejectOnFull:      true,
@@ const burstCeiling = 50
-const burstCeiling = 50
+const burstCeiling = 80
*** End Patch
